description_long: This doll is styled after a classic cartoon character, featuring a large round head with prominent black mouse ears and a red dress adorned with white polka dots. The doll's hands are gloved in oversized white gloves with black lines, and it wears matching red shoes. A separate red bow with white polka dots floats above the head, suggesting it is an accessory. The face is characterized by large eyes, a small nose, and a smiling mouth, with the head and ears rendered in a glossy black finish. The overall appearance is playful and iconic, with a strong emphasis on bold, contrasting colors and smooth, rounded forms.
description: A cartoon-inspired doll with black mouse ears, a red polka-dot dress, white gloves, red shoes, and a matching polka-dot bow accessory.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, red dress with white polka dots, white gloves, red shoes, and the floating polka-dot bow above the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the protruding nose, the thickness of the dress, and the side of the bow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and ears, the back of the dress, and the bow from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, the curvature of the dress, and the side of the bow.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic cartoon-inspired outfit with a red A-line dress featuring white polka dots, oversized white gloves, and red shoes, complemented by a red and white polka-dot bow accessory. The style is reminiscent of 20th-century American animation fashion.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and slightly apart, and the head facing forward. The torso is upright and static.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with wide eyes, arched eyebrows, and a small upturned mouth, conveying a cheerful and friendly demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and black with large round mouse ears.
